---
title: "_04_citing_studies_Scopus"
author: "Josefina Weinerova"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# package loading
```{r}
if (!require(pacman)) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, httr, jsonlite,
  purrr, dplyr, tibble, data.table,
  stringr, rscopus
)

source("R/scopus_helpers.R")
```

#data loading
```{r}
full_matched_df <- readRDS("data/full_matched_df.rds")
df_meta <- readRDS("data/metadata_OpenAlex.rds")
```
# Switch citation type

```{r switch}
# Choose citation type: "original" or "rep"
citation_type <- "rep"

cfg <- switch(
  citation_type,
  
  "original" = list(
    dois       = full_matched_df$doi,
    raw_dir    = "scopus_raw",
    out_csv    = "citing_studies_scopus.csv",
    log_csv    = "scopus_progress_log.csv",
    raw_suffix = "_doc.rds",
    out_rds    = "data/citing_studies_scopus.rds",
    dedup      = FALSE
  ),
  
  "rep" = list(
    dois       = df_meta$doi_r,
    raw_dir    = "scopus_raw_rep",
    out_csv    = "citing_studies_scopus_rep_add.csv",
    log_csv    = "scopus_progress_log_rep_add.csv",
    raw_suffix = "_doc_rep.rds",
    out_rds    = "data/citing_studies_scopus_rep.rds",
    dedup      = TRUE
  ),
  
  stop("Invalid citation_type. Choose 'original' or 'rep'.")
)

# Clean DOIs
dois <- cfg$dois |>
  trimws() |>
  (\(x) unique(x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]))()

message("Citation type: ", citation_type)
message("Unique DOIs to query: ", length(dois))
```
#run the scopus citation pipeline

```{r run-pipeline}
key <- Sys.getenv("SCOPUS_API_KEY")
rscopus::set_api_key(key)

run_scopus_citing_pipeline(
  dois       = dois,
  api_key    = key,
  raw_dir    = cfg$raw_dir,
  out_csv    = cfg$out_csv,
  log_csv    = cfg$log_csv,
  raw_suffix = cfg$raw_suffix
)
```

# Post-processing and save

```{r post-process}
citing_studies <- read.csv(cfg$out_csv)

citing_studies$year <- substr(citing_studies$citing_date, 1, 4)

if (cfg$dedup) {
  citing_studies <- citing_studies |>
    dplyr::distinct(doi_queried, citing_eid, .keep_all = TRUE)
}

citing_studies <- citing_studies |>
  dplyr::distinct(doi_queried, citing_eid, .keep_all = TRUE)

message("Unique DOIs queried: ", length(unique(citing_studies$doi_queried)))

save_rds_atomic(citing_studies, cfg$out_rds)
```
